LightningComponentBundle.description: Custom component that I will use in the Configurator UI

property.name: optionGroups
property.label: Option Groups
property.description: Enter the API name of a resource that contains a collection of ProductConfig__OptionGroup records that contain product option data to group by product category. See Salesforce help about configuring this component.

property.name: isNonBlokingEnabled
property.label: Non Blocking Enabled
property.description: Enter the API name of a boolean resource that indicates whether Non Blocking is enabled.

property.name: isApiInProgress
property.label: Wait for API
property.description: A Boolean value that indicates whether the API call is in progress.

property.name: layoutMode
property.label: Layout Mode
property.description: Enter a string value that specifies the layout mode of the Configurator UI, either Compact or Standard.

property.name: searchResultOptionId
property.label: Search Result Option ID
property.description: Enter the ID of the search option item that the user selects.

property.name: currencyCode
property.label: Currency Code
property.description: Enter the API name of a resource that contains the currency code to use for the transaction. See Salesforce help about configuring this component.

property.name: optionGroupsDisplayStyle
property.label: Option Groups Display Style
property.description: Specify how to display option groups. Valid values are accordions or tabs.

property.name: isDesignTime
property.label: Preview Mode
property.description: A Boolean value that indicates whether a product or product classification record was viewed in preview mode.

property.name: salesTransactionItems
property.label: Sales Transaction Items
property.description: A collection of Apex ProductConfig__SalesTransactionItem records that contain sales transaction item details.
